title: Plan: hex Context Injection into opencode (ADR-2603231800)
description: Implement hex CLI command to inject hex's complete context (MCP tools, agent definitions, skills, hooks, enforcement rules) into opencode's configuration system

steps.description: Create opencode.rs command module in hex-cli/src/commands/
Implement MCP server injection - inject hex MCP spec into opencode mcpServers config
Implement agent definitions converter - convert hex YAML agents to opencode format and inject
Implement skills injector - inject hex skills as opencode slash commands
Implement hooks injector - inject hex hooks into opencode's hook system
Implement enforcement rules injector - inject ADR compliance rules into opencode
Implement project config injector - inject .hex/project.json into opencode settings
Implement hex opencode remove command - remove hex context from opencode settings
Implement hex opencode status command - check what hex context is configured
Add tests for settings merging - verify non-destructive merge, validation, rollback
Update hex-cli mod.rs to register opencode command module

phases.name: SPECS
phases.description: Define detailed behavioral specs for opencode injection

phases.name: WORKTREES
phases.description: Create isolated worktrees per adapter layer

phases.name: CODE
phases.description: Implement code with TDD in parallel worktrees

phases.name: VALIDATE
phases.description: Run validation judge for semantic verification

phases.name: FINALIZE
phases.description: Cleanup worktrees, commit, update ADR status
